title: General purpose AI with access to live market data?
author: airpipeline
selftext:
Excuse me in advance if this has already been answered, or if I’m just missing something obvious, but are there any general purpose (or even specialized like included in brokerage apps) AIs that have access to live or slightly delayed market data? What about access to large sets of historical market data?

Bonus question: general purpose AIs know the rules of various markets and many common tactics (good), but they don’t appear to understand strategy.  What AIs that are better at this?

Ideally with no coding required, and if necessary I could make do.  Thank you in advance!

comments.author: claytantor
comments.body: We do over at [https://katbot.ai](https://katbot.ai) but you have to select which tokens you want to analyze. There would just be too much data to make recommendations otherwise.

replies.author: airpipeline
replies.body: Looks like a crypto only thing.

replies.author: claytantor
replies.body: Yes, that is true and worthy of callout. Hope this wasn't noise.
